title: krameria lanceolata
intro: Krameria lanceolata, also known as Rhatany, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Krameria genus and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating mouth and gum infections due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Krameria lanceolata include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote wound healing. Krameria lanceolata is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
